---
title: "Margaret Sarah Dampier"
---

## Margaret Sarah Dampier

**Dates:** (1802/3-June 1870)

### Description

neighbour of CMY

### Biography

The mother of Jane Mary (Dampier) Smith-Dampier, and of Emily and William John Dampier, she lived at Twyford House, very near Otterbourne.

### Letters

- Letter from July 5th [1870]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
